name: Dinosaur Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow Bright Pink - Pillowfort™
description: Surprise your darling on their birthday or any other occasion with the Dinosaur Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow from Pillow fort™. Designed in the shape of a dinosaur, this figural throw pillow has a tail, red crest and white horns for a cute look. Made with soft and stretchy fabric with 100% polyester filling for a cozy feel, it's sure to be their new favorite snuggle buddy.
